```{r}
source("config.R")
```

#Load library
```{r}
library(DESeq2)
library(edgeR)        
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
```

```{r}
COUNTDIR <- file.path(BASEDIR, "counts")
CLINDIR  <- file.path(BASEDIR, "clinical")
OUTDIR <- DIR_PAIRED

if (!dir.exists(OUTDIR)) dir.create(OUTDIR, recursive = TRUE)
cat("Output will be written to:", OUTDIR, "\n")

raw_counts <- read.delim(file.path(COUNTDIR, "DEA_counts.tsv"),
                         row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)
anno       <- read.delim(file.path(COUNTDIR, "gene_symbols.tsv"),
                         check.names = FALSE)
meta_all   <- read.delim(file.path(CLINDIR, "all_samples.txt"),
                         check.names = FALSE,
                         na.strings = c("NA","N/A","999",""))
```

```{r}
# Select patients with at least one ipsilateral recurrence
ipsi_pts <- meta_all %>%
  filter(tissue_pathology %in% c("ipsilateral DCIS", "ipsilateral IBC")) %>%
  pull(patient_id) %>% unique()

# Keep only those who also have a Primary sample
primary_pts <- meta_all$patient_id[meta_all$tissue == "Primary"]
paired_pts  <- intersect(ipsi_pts, primary_pts)
cat("Paired patients:", length(paired_pts), "\n")   # expect 19

# Pick one Primary per patient (first by sample_id) and one Recurrence per patient (prefer IBC > DCIS)
pick_one <- function(df, tissue_priority = NULL) {
  if (!is.null(tissue_priority))
    df <- df[order(match(df$tissue_pathology, tissue_priority)), ]
  df[1, , drop = FALSE]
}

primaries <- meta_all %>%
  filter(patient_id %in% paired_pts, tissue == "Primary") %>%
  group_by(patient_id) %>% group_modify(~ pick_one(.x)) %>% ungroup()

recurrences <- meta_all %>%
  filter(patient_id %in% paired_pts,
         tissue_pathology %in% c("ipsilateral DCIS", "ipsilateral IBC")) %>%
  group_by(patient_id) %>%
  group_modify(~ pick_one(.x,
                          tissue_priority = c("ipsilateral IBC",
                                              "ipsilateral DCIS"))) %>%
  ungroup()

meta_paired <- bind_rows(primaries, recurrences) %>%
  mutate(tissue_state = factor(ifelse(tissue == "Primary",
                                      "Primary", "Recurrence"),
                               levels = c("Primary", "Recurrence")),
         patient_id   = factor(patient_id)) %>%
  arrange(patient_id, tissue_state)

cat("Final paired matrix:", nrow(meta_paired), "samples\n")
print(table(meta_paired$tissue_state))
stopifnot(nrow(meta_paired) == 2 * length(paired_pts))
```

```{r}
shared <- intersect(colnames(raw_counts), meta_paired$sample_id)
counts <- raw_counts[, shared]
meta_paired <- meta_paired[match(shared, meta_paired$sample_id), ]
rownames(meta_paired) <- meta_paired$sample_id
stopifnot(identical(colnames(counts), as.character(meta_paired$sample_id)))
cat("Aligned:", nrow(counts), "genes x", ncol(counts), "samples\n")
```

```{r}
# Mirroring the WGCNA biotype filter
keep_biotype <- anno$ensembl_gene_id[
  anno$gene_biotype %in% c("protein_coding", "lncRNA")]
counts <- counts[rownames(counts) %in% keep_biotype, ]
cat("After biotype filter:", nrow(counts), "genes\n")

# Expression filter using the tissue contrast
y    <- DGEList(counts = counts, group = meta_paired$tissue_state)
keep <- filterByExpr(y, group = meta_paired$tissue_state)
counts_filt <- counts[keep, ]
cat("After filterByExpr:", nrow(counts_filt), "genes\n")
```

```{r}
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = counts_filt,
  colData   = meta_paired,
  design    = ~ patient_id + tissue_state)

cat("Design rank check:\n")
print(qr(model.matrix(design(dds), colData(dds)))$rank)
print(ncol(model.matrix(design(dds), colData(dds))))
```

```{r}
dds <- DESeq(dds)
resultsNames(dds)                                
res <- results(dds, name = "tissue_state_Recurrence_vs_Primary")
res_shrunk <- lfcShrink(dds, coef = "tissue_state_Recurrence_vs_Primary",
                        type = "apeglm")
summary(res_shrunk)
```

```{r}
res_df <- as.data.frame(res_shrunk) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("ensembl_gene_id") %>%
  left_join(anno[, c("ensembl_gene_id", "hgnc_symbol", "gene_biotype")],
            by = "ensembl_gene_id") %>%
  mutate(diffexpressed = case_when(
    is.na(padj)                              ~ "NO",
    padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange >  0.5      ~ "UP",
    padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange < -0.5      ~ "DOWN",
    TRUE                                     ~ "NO"))

cat("DEGs at |log2FC|>0.5 & padj<0.05:\n")
print(table(res_df$diffexpressed))
cat("\nBy biotype:\n")
print(table(res_df$gene_biotype, res_df$diffexpressed))
```

```{r}
vst_mat <- vst(dds, blind = FALSE)
pca_df  <- plotPCA(vst_mat, intgroup = c("tissue_state", "patient_id"),
                   returnData = TRUE)
pv <- round(100 * attr(pca_df, "percentVar"))

p_pca <- ggplot(pca_df, aes(PC1, PC2,
                            colour = tissue_state, group = patient_id)) +
  geom_line(colour = "grey70", linewidth = 0.3) +    # connects pairs
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(x = paste0("PC1 (", pv[1], "%)"),
       y = paste0("PC2 (", pv[2], "%)"),
       title = "Paired primary vs recurrence (lines = same patient)") +
  theme_bw()

p_volc <- ggplot(res_df, aes(log2FoldChange, -log10(padj),
                             colour = diffexpressed)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c(UP="#C00000", DOWN="#0070C0", NO="grey70")) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype="dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.5, 0.5), linetype="dashed") +
  geom_text_repel(data = res_df %>%
                    filter(diffexpressed != "NO") %>%
                    arrange(padj) %>% head(20),
                  aes(label = hgnc_symbol), size = 3, max.overlaps = 25) +
  labs(title = "Primary vs Recurrence (apeglm-shrunk)") +
  theme_bw()

print(p_pca); print(p_volc)
```

```{r}
out_df <- res_df %>%
  select(ensembl_gene_id, hgnc_symbol, gene_biotype,
         baseMean, log2FoldChange, lfcSE,
         pvalue, padj, diffexpressed)
rownames(out_df) <- out_df$ensembl_gene_id
out_df$ensembl_gene_id <- NULL

write.table(out_df,
            file.path(OUTDIR, "primary_vs_recurrence_DEgenes.tsv"),
            sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = TRUE)

cat("Written to:", file.path(OUTDIR, "primary_vs_recurrence_DEgenes.tsv"), "\n")
saveRDS(dds, file.path(INTERMEDIATE, "primary_vs_recurrence_dds.rds"))
```

```{r}
ggsave(file.path(OUTDIR, "primary_vs_recurrence_PCA.png"),
       p_pca,  width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 200, bg = "white")
ggsave(file.path(OUTDIR, "primary_vs_recurrence_volcano.png"),
       p_volc, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 200, bg = "white")
```
